auth.registerUnavailableBody: We have paused self-service registration while the authentication cutover is being finalized. Please sign in with an existing account or contact the association to request access.

errors.memberOrEmailRequired: Enter your member number or email
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters
errors.passwordAlphanumeric: Password must contain letters and numbers
errors.passwordSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special symbol (!@#$%^&*...)
errors.memberNumberExists: This member number is already registered

rooms.title: Game Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Explore our rooms and book your table
rooms.noTables: This room has no tables yet

tables.surfaceConflict: This table already has the other surface reserved at this time

reservations.title: My Reservations
reservations.subtitle: Manage your table reservations
reservations.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?

errors.conflictTime: A reservation already exists at that time
errors.pastDate: You cannot book dates in the past
errors.invalidTime: End time must be after start time

admin.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.

home.heroSubtitle: Alea Cultural Association — the reference space for tabletop RPGs, board games, and play culture in our city.
home.featuresSubtitle: This platform is your control center to manage tables, reservations, and more.
home.feature1Desc: Check real-time availability across all 6 rooms and reserve your table for any gaming session.
home.feature2Desc: Every table has its own QR code. Scan it to activate your booking or check status at any time.
home.feature3Desc: Access your reservation history, cancel when you can't attend, and organize your gaming sessions easily.
home.feature4Desc: From small tables for intimate games to removable-top tables for wargames and 3D dungeon maps.
home.ctaSubtitle: Create your account with your member number and start booking.
